hotel_name: Khách sạn Mỹ Cảng Trà Vinh (Hotel Mỹ Cảng Trà Vinh)

reviews.title: Business trip
reviews.text: The room condition is good, but there are no places to eat or walk around the hotel.^^

reviews.title: Pretty good option for Tra Vinh.
reviews.positives: Pretty clean and nice for Tra Vinh.  Nice garden area.
reviews.negatives: A little too far from city center, and not quite worth the price

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hơi xa trung tâm tí, nhưng được cái phòng ốc rất mới, đầy đủ tiện nghi, nệm êm ngủ ngon. Có cho thuê xe máy tại KS luôn nha mng

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The air conditioning  (too warm  in the room.)

reviews.title: weekend rest
reviews.text: The restroom is clean. The staff are attentive and very enthusiastic. It's a bit far from the center but very quiet. It's still convenient to visit Ba Om pond, the pagoda, and tourist areas.

reviews.title: Value for the money. Loveiy
reviews.positives: Nice location. The staff very helpful. The gardener also clean the car for me (i didnt ask him to do so). Just wonderful asmosphere
reviews.negatives: Room key is quite sticky

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.text: May I ask what type of pillow the hotel uses that is comfortable for someone like me who has long-standing shoulder and neck pain, yet feels very pleasant to lie on?

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Khong co thang may - without elevator

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Worth the money, clean and model room, not to far from center if you have motorbike

reviews.title: De pasó en Tra Vinh
reviews.positives: La casa es muy bonita,la habitación tiene una decoración preciosa, cama cómoda y muy limpio. En general el hotel es muy acogedor, tiene un patio interior agradable, parking, dispensador de agua fria y caliente en recepción. A/C y wifi funcionan de maravilla. Artículos de aseo, Lo recomiendo.
reviews.negatives:
Un poco alejado del centro pero si tienes vehículo no es un problema. 
No tiene nevera.

reviews.title: Juste bien pour 1 nuit
reviews.positives:
Lit confortable 
Clim
reviews.negatives:
Pas de savon ou shampoing 
Pas de papier toilette 
Accueil bof 
Le personnel ne parle pas anglais 
Excentré
Beaucoup de bruit extérieur (fête anniversaire ou Karaoké…)

reviews.title: Très correct
reviews.positives: Accueil sympathique
reviews.negatives: Mal placé ( mais au calme) Obligé de prendre des taxis

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Personnel très sympathique. Ils nous ont aidé à réserver nos transports pour repartir. 
La chambre est propre et l'hôtel a dû être refait a neuf récemment
reviews.negatives:
À côté de l'hôtel il y avait un bar et malheureusement celui-ci était particulièrement bruyant 
L'hôtel est relativement excentré du centre également

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: chambre spacieuse et confortable, bon rapport qualité prix
reviews.negatives: Le personnel ne parle pas anglais

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Très bon séjour dans cet hôtel, la chambre était propre et assez grande. Excellent rapport qualité prix.

Le personnel était très sympathique malgré la communication parfois difficile car ils ne parlaient pas un seul mot anglais.

On a pu louer un scooter via l'hôtel, primordial si vous voulez vous déplacer dans tra vinh. L'hôtel est assez éloigné

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Super hotel très bien rénové.
Les proprio son't très sympas mais ne parlent bien pas anglais..
Jolie chambre , confortable .un excellent séjour
reviews.negatives: L'absence de petit dej.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Gentillesse des propriétaires

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Personal sprach kein Englisch, war aber freundlich.
War zwischenzeitlich laut, da die Kinder des Personals in der Lobby beaufsichtigt wurden.
reviews.negatives: Hotel liegt sehr weit entfernt vom Stadtzentrum.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Nessuno dello staff parlava una parola di inglese! L’hotel è fuori dal centro, senza scooter non prendi nemmeno un caffè!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: De kamers waren prima. Bed erg goed. Toen we eerder uit Tra Vinh wilden vertrekken heeft de receptioniste snel en goed geholpen om dit te regelen.
reviews.negatives: Tra Vinh op zich heel weinig te doen met geen tot weinig leuke plekken om ergens te zitten of eten. Het hotel ligt buiten het centrum. De familie van receptionist (moeder, zus en 2 kleine kinderen) maakten veel herrie wat nogal al storend was.

reviews.title: Đi công tác
reviews.positives: tệ
reviews.negatives:
Mình đi rất nhiều nơi nhưng nơi đây giá mắc so với mặt bằng chung các tỉnh khác vật chất k xứng đáng tầm giá
phòng dọn dẹp không kỹ vẫn nhiều bụi tolet dọn k sạch 
vị trí xa trung tâm 
Nói chung vô tình vào với tầm giá như thế nghĩ phòng sẽ tương xứng sẽ không quay lại

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Sạch se, mới

reviews.title: Ổn trừ toilet
reviews.positives: Phòng ấm cúng, kiểu gia đình
reviews.negatives: Toilet hôi

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Phòng rất đẹp và giường thoải mái, nhân viên nhiệt tình
reviews.negatives: Ko có

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ, tiện nghi
reviews.negatives: Không có tủ lạnh

reviews.title: tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: mình có việc về trể 2h mà ksan vẫn ko thu thêm phí , cam on ks nhiều

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nhà vệ sinh sạch, nước mạnh. Nv thái độ ân cần. Ban đầu đến thấy hơi xa trung tâm nhưng ở thấy ok yên tĩnh đi cũng ko xa lắm tiện tham quan ao bà om, chùa và các khu du lịch

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ, thơm tho, không gian nội khu mát mẻ. Cách trung tâm chỉ tầm 10pndi chuyển

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ rất thoáng mềm ấm mềm mình và Chồng mình rất hài phòng khách sạn Mỹ Cảng này.....

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn đẹp, giá rẻ, nhân viên thân thiện

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Chỗ nghỉ nội thất sang trọng, thích nhất nệm ngủ rất êm và thoải mái
reviews.negatives: Nv chưa nhiệt tình lắm, thiếu nụ cười niềm nở

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Mình đi công tác tìm đc chỗ nghỉ quá tuyệt. Sẽ trở lại nếu công tác Trà Vinh

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tốt

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nơi ở sạch sẽ thoáng mái

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng mới đẹp!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Siisti hotelli erinomaiseen hintaan. Ystävällinen henkilökunta. Poikkeuksellisen mukavat ja hyvät sängyt.
reviews.negatives: Sijainti on hieman syrjäinen, mutta olimme liikenteessä mopolla, joten se ei ollut ongelma.

reviews.title: Спокойная ночь
reviews.positives: Тихо. Спокойно. Чисто.

reviews.title: Če bi bila spet v Tra Vinhu, bi najela to nastanitev ponovno.
reviews.positives:
Soba je bila čista in obnovljena. Na dvorišču je varnostnik 24 ur, na recepciji so bili uslužni, oprali so nama obleko.
Okolica je mirna. V bližini je velik park.

reviews.title: Nový a čistý hotel za dobrou cenu
reviews.positives: Nový hotel, vybaveni pokoje
reviews.negatives: Ackoli bylo vybaveni nove, tak v koupelně chybná instalace, volná baterie, ve sprše hadice - škoda.

reviews.title: Bon lloc per una estada!!
reviews.positives: El llit molt comode, la gent molt amable i molt bona situació per fer ruta pel Mekong.
reviews.negatives: No disposen de la opció de esmorzar (ni cap altre àpat).

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Room was clean enough.
reviews.negatives:
The aircon was noisy and took too long to cool the room. 
No tea or coffee in the room and uses plastic cup. 
Far from the city centre. 
Low quality of bed sheets and bathroom towels..

reviews.title: Would not go back
reviews.positives: Room right next to the reception and noisy children of the staff. No shops or restaurants within walking distance.
reviews.negatives: See above. Room large and clean enough.

reviews.title: Good place for just sleeping.
reviews.positives: The room was clean  and  comfortable when the curtains were closed. There is enough parking space. The area is out of the center so very quiet.
reviews.negatives: The room was ground floor so I had to keep the curtain closed for privacy. The garden was not as I expected from the photos. Receiving reception staff was not too friendly, maybe because of language issues.

reviews.title: Good choice
reviews.positives: Very clean and quiet place, seems quite new. You need a scooter or walk a bit since it is not in center.
reviews.negatives: AC was somehow quite loud.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Nice place, comfortable beds. Cheap scooter rental.
reviews.negatives:
The place is remote, but easily accessible by taxi.
They do not speak English, but service is good anyways.

reviews.title: Very good CP value hotel at Tra Vinh.
reviews.positives: Good value for money, staffs were very friendly and helpful. The bed is very comfy and clean.  For sure will come again.
reviews.negatives: NIL
